title: Cloudflare Web Application Firewall Configuration
description: Review and configure a Web Application Firewall (WAF) for the DataTools Pro application. WAFs are intended to reduce compromises on public-facing web applications caused by poor coding or application management practices. This requires research into Cloudflare's WAF capabilities and configuration options appropriate for the application's traffic patterns and security requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Cloudflare WAF rules are reviewed and configured for the production domain
WAF configuration does not block legitimate application traffic
Security rules are documented for future reference
implementation_notes: Research task requiring investigation of Cloudflare WAF capabilities. Assigned to Ryan for infrastructure-level configuration.
